niche: developers running local AI agents with governance

attention_pools.name: LocalLLaMA
attention_pools.notes: High signal on Ollama and agent tooling

pain_sentence: I know I should run agents locally with policy and memory, but I never trust them with my files or channels.

hooks.text: Your agent can post to Slack before you see the draft. Mine cannot.
What if your coding agent had an immune system?
